examples: a grotesque reflection in the mirror

meanings.definition: extraordinarily good or great ; used especially as intensifiers
examples: a fantastic trip to the Orient
a marvelous collection of rare books
had a rattling conversation about politics
a fantastic idea of his own importance

meanings.definition: existing in fancy only; - Nathaniel Hawthorne
examples: fantastic figures with bulbous heads the circumference of a bushel

meanings.definition: extravagantly fanciful in design, construction, appearance
